name: Cresta
description: AI agent augmentation for contact centers with real-time coaching, voice agents and post-call wrap-ups.

seo.title: Cresta — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Cresta: AI agent augmentation for contact centers with real-time coaching, voice agents and post-call wrap-ups.

when_to_use: Real-time coaching for contact center agents on live calls
AI voice agent handling inbound tier-1 support calls
Post-call summary automation reducing wrap-up time
Agent performance insights for contact center managers
Live objection-handling suggestions during sales calls

pros: Real-time agent coaching drives measurable lift
Strong voice AI for contact centers
Backed by Sequoia and proven enterprise logos
cons: Model tuning needs ongoing ops work
review.verdict: Premium real-time contact-center AI that pays off at scale but demands enterprise commitment.
review.best_for: Large contact centers with hundreds of agents needing live coaching and voice AI.
review.not_for: Small support teams or chat-only operations without voice volume.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
